symbolic_system.boundary: Only the protocol-writing consequence from the upstream RAE packet is routed into downstream CDP drafting.

carrier.carrier_state: upstream licensed consequence mapped to downstream use with required metadata
carrier.carrier_state_space: record ids, consequences, downstream uses, preserved metadata, lost metadata, route status

use_episode.use: Use an upstream RAE licensed consequence as the downstream CDP protocol-writing input.
use_episode.actor_context: RAE packet output feeding CDP protocol drafting
use_episode.inference_drawn: The drafting input is licensed only while no-collection, no-threshold, CDP-hosting, and review metadata are preserved.
non_inferences: The RAE packet authorizes CDP promotion.
The downstream CDP protocol is accepted before CDP review.

binding.binding_target: upstream consequence to downstream use transition

validity.validity_criterion: The downstream use must consume only the upstream licensed consequence and preserve required scope, standing, confidence, and blocked-consequence metadata.
validity.validity_evidence: The route preserves protocol-writing-only scope and blocks collection/promotion consequences.
validity.uncertainty: Future CDP review and acceptance remain downstream conditions.

scope.scope_conditions: RAE Pilot 002 may route protocol-writing direction into CDP drafting only.

recognition_authority.recognizer_standing: RAE and operator standing route drafting only; CDP standing is required for future acceptance.
recognition_authority.authority_source: RAE packet discipline, operator direction, and CDP repo governance.
recognition_authority.uptake_path: RAE packet -> operator direction -> CDP protocol draft -> CDP review
recognition_authority.standing_resolution_basis: Established standing exists for drafting route; CDP acceptance remains restricted/future.
standing_open_questions: Will CDP accept or revise the completed protocol?

distributed_standing.standing_scope: frame and license bounded protocol-writing direction
licensed_consequences: route protocol-writing consequence to downstream CDP drafting
route protocol-writing consequence to downstream CDP drafting

distributed_standing.standing_scope: accept, revise, or reject completed protocol
licensed_consequences: accept, revise, or reject completed protocol
blocked_consequences: authorize collection from RAE packet alone

policy_license.attempted_consequence: Route protocol-writing output into downstream drafting.
policy_license.action_policy: Only consequences licensed by upstream record and covered by downstream standing may route.
policy_license.licensed_consequence: route protocol-writing consequence to downstream CDP drafting
policy_license.license_basis: Upstream route license plus preserved metadata.

consequence_routes.consequence: route protocol-writing consequence to downstream CDP drafting
consequence_routes.route_basis: Both recognizers have established standing for the local drafting route.

transmission.transmission_path: RAE packet record -> cross-record route -> CDP protocol-drafting record

cross_record_routes.composition_basis: The downstream use consumes only the upstream drafting consequence and preserves all required restrictions.

verdict.claim_ceiling: licensed downstream drafting route with collection and promotion blocked
verdict.next_check: Test whether this route can compose again into collection authorization without laundering metadata.

review.promotion_authority: CDP maintainer for protocol acceptance; no collection authority

reflexive_pressure.notes: Cross-record composition requires explicit metadata preservation, not just named upstream/downstream links.

source.artifact: Source-selection routing into future pilot design

symbolic_system.boundary: Only source-fit routing can feed pilot design; collection and quantitative claims remain blocked.

carrier.carrier_state: source-selection consequence routed to pilot-design use with collection blocked
carrier.carrier_state_space: source verdicts, downstream use, required metadata, route status

use_episode.use: Use source-selection verdicts to select candidate sources for future pilot design.
use_episode.inference_drawn: Candidate/support/reject-as-primary routing may inform pilot design only while no-collection and no-quantitative-claim metadata survive.
non_inferences: A source rejected as primary is low quality.

validity.validity_criterion: The downstream pilot design preserves source-fit scope, no-collection status, and source-native/protocol-fit standing separation.
validity.validity_evidence: The route keeps source selection distinct from collection authorization.
validity.confidence: medium for planning; no collection evidence
validity.uncertainty: Future pilot review must still authorize collection.

scope.scope_conditions: Source-selection verdicts may route to pilot design only.

recognition_authority.recognizer_standing: CDP author standing covers source-fit routing; reviewer standing required for future collection.
recognition_authority.authority_source: CDP source-selection criteria and future pilot review.
recognition_authority.uptake_path: source-selection record -> future pilot design -> future review
recognition_authority.standing_resolution_basis: Routing standing established; collection standing unresolved.

distributed_standing.standing_scope: classify source fit for protocol design
licensed_consequences: route source-selection verdict to pilot design

policy_license.attempted_consequence: Route source-selection verdict to future pilot design.
policy_license.action_policy: Planning may consume source-fit verdicts; collection requires separate review.
policy_license.licensed_consequence: route source-selection verdict to pilot design
policy_license.license_basis: Source-selection fit verdict with no-collection metadata preserved.

consequence_routes.consequence: route source-selection verdict to pilot design
consequence_routes.route_basis: Source-selection author has standing for fit routing.

cross_record_routes.downstream_use: choose candidate source inputs for pilot design
cross_record_routes.composition_basis: The downstream design step consumes only source-fit routing, not collection authority.

verdict.claim_ceiling: licensed pilot-design input route with collection blocked
verdict.next_check: Require future collection record to re-establish reviewer standing.

review.promotion_authority: future Workstream B reviewer for collection

reflexive_pressure.notes: A source-selection result can route into planning only if no-collection metadata survives.
